notes: Successfully completed all sections of the XBD Collective cinematic homepage concept. Refined the hero column widener accordion to use static grid hovers (focusing interactions on image zooms, WebGL refraction, and card vertical shifts for a more tectonic feel). Integrated a Typographic Curtain that splits on scroll, the SVG text-masked Execution Proof section showing blueprint-to-object loops, asymmetric Masonry catalog grid with opposing scroll parallax, and a concierge email inquiry exit. Dev server is active on port 8080 with caching disabled.
key_decisions: Brand diagnosis locked - do not revisit
Motion posture: Calm. No hijacking. Fade-in + gentle parallax.
Signature claim: Reality-Makers - from structural frame to final object
Pivoted from Day-to-Night timeline slider to Cinematic Triptych with hover accordion to showcase multi-disciplinary range (Architecture, Interiors, Details) on entry.
Mapped Option B entrance to 'Boutique Ethos, Global Perspective' tagline.
Set card z-index to 1000 to raise it above WebGL canvas (z-index 999).
Moved header to bottom of DOM body for stacking.
Disabled server caching (-c-1) and added query param to style.css link to prevent cached asset loading.
Pivoted hero accordion from flex-grow widening to static three-column grid with image zooms and vertical card shifts to prevent layout reflows and support tectonic weight.
Implemented scroll-bound split panels for the Typographic Curtain.
Used an SVG mask overlay for the Section 5 video-cutout text masking to ensure robust cross-browser playback.
